hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase
hierarchy.overline: text-xs md:text-sm font-medium tracking-[0.2em] text-[#D4AF37] uppercase

bento_grid.description: Asymmetric, high visual tension, overlapping elements for services section.

animations.scroll_reveal: framer-motion whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40 }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] }}
animations.3d_tilt: framer-motion useTransform mapped to mouse coordinates for smooth 3D rotation on hover. Apply to service cards and before-after gallery.
animations.parallax: framer-motion useScroll and useTransform for background image parallax.

service_trading.alt: Luxurious black sports car parked indoors

navbar.language_switcher: Text based: DE | EN | FR | IT (No flags)

hero.heading: Alawi Cars
hero.paragraph: Perfektion bis ins kleinste Detail. Ihr erstklassiger Partner für Glanz, Sicherheit und Zuverlässigkeit in der Schweiz.

gallery.heading: Vorher & Nachher
gallery.description: Erleben Sie den Unterschied unserer Premium-Pflege.

technical_instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Satoshi' fonts to index.html using Fontshare CDN: @import url('https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@900,800,700,500,400&f[]=satoshi@900,700,500,400,300&display=swap');
Configure tailwind.config.js with fonts and colors from this JSON.
Implement 3D tilt effect on service cards using pure Framer Motion (useMotionValue, useSpring, useTransform mapping mouse X/Y to rotateX/rotateY).
Implement the Before/After gallery using an interactive image comparison slider (like react-compare-slider), and wrap the entire slider container in the 3D tilt effect.
Apply strict glassmorphism classes as defined in this JSON. Ensure elements over the hero image have sufficient contrast.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements (buttons, language switcher, service cards).
Ensure all text is strictly in German (DE). The language switcher should just be an elegant text UI element (DE | EN | FR | IT).
NEVER use placeholders. Use only the provided image URLs.
Implement scroll reveal animations for all sections.
